zh.lifeSummary: 當Anthony Fisher於1557年2月1日出生在英國英格蘭素福爾可希勒哈姆時，他的父親William Fisher33歲，母親Margery Bert28歲。他於1586年10月16日與Mary Fiske在英國英格蘭素福爾可福雷辛費爾德結婚。他們至少是7個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1640年4月在他的家鄉享年83歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭素福爾可希勒哈姆。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Anthony Fisher于1557年2月1日出生在英国英格兰素福爾可希勒哈姆时，他的父亲William Fisher33岁，母亲Margery Bert28岁。他于1586年10月16日与Mary Fiske在英国英格兰素福爾可福雷辛費爾德结婚。他们至少是7个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于1640年4月在他的家乡享年83岁，埋葬在英国英格兰素福爾可希勒哈姆。

nameMeanings.name: Fisher
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: occupational name for a fisherman, from Middle English fis(sc)her(e) ‘fisherman’ (Old English fiscere). In North America, this surname has absorbed cognates from many other languages, including German Fischer and its Slavic(ized) variant Fišer (see Fiser ), Dutch Visser , Hungarian Halász (see Halasz ), Italian Pescatore , Slovenian Ribič (see Ribic ), and Croatian Ribić or Ribar .

English: in a few cases, possibly a topographic name for someone who lived near a fish weir on a river, from Middle English fis(sc)hwere, fisshyar ‘fish weir’ (Old English fiscwer, fiscgear), or a habitational name from a place so named, such as Fisher in North Mundham, Sussex.
Irish: translation into English of Gaelic Ó Bradáin ‘descendant of Bradán’, a personal name meaning ‘salmon’. See Braden .

variants.name: Fischer
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Kurt, Hans, Otto, Erwin, Gerhard, Helmut, Fritz, Klaus, Horst, Dieter, Franz, Ernst.

German, Danish, and Jewish (Ashkenazic): occupational name for a fisherman, from Middle High German visch, German Fisch ‘fish’ + the agent suffix -er. This form of the surname is also established in some other parts of Europe, notably in France (Alsace and Lorraine), Hungary, and the Netherlands. In Poland, Czechia, Croatia, and Slovenia it is (also) established in the Slavicized forms Fiszer (Polish) and Fišer (see Fiser ). Compare Fisher .

nameMeanings.name: Anthony
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: The usual English form of the old Roman family name Antonius, which is of uncertain (probably Etruscan) origin. The spelling with -th- (not normally reflected in the pronunciation) represents a learned but erroneous attempt to associate it with Greek anthos ‘flower’. In the post-classical period it was a common name, borne by various early saints, most notably a 3rd-century Egyptian hermit monk, who is regarded as the founder of Christian monasticism.

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

historicEvents.title: State Lottery
historicEvents.description: A State Lottery was recorded in 1569. The tickets were sold at St. Paul's Cathedral in London.

historicEvents.title: The First English Colony is Established in America
historicEvents.description: England established its first colony in North America in 1585 as a way to generate additional wealth. The colony was named Virginia, after the virgin Queen Elizabeth I.

historicEvents.title: Elizabeth I Signs Death Warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots
historicEvents.description: Elizabeth I signed the death warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots, on February 1, 1587, as she was found guilty of plotting to assasinate Elizabeth. Mary, Queen of Scots, was beheaded at Fotheringhay Castle in England on February 8, 1587.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Elizabeth I.org - Mary Queen of Scots

historicEvents.title: The Honourable East India Company
historicEvents.description: The Honourable East India Company, a British joint-stock company, was established in 1600 for trade in the Indian Ocean region. At its height, the British East India Company had a private army which was twice the size of the British Army, ruled large sections of India, and revenues in the millions.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Historic UK - The East India Company

historicEvents.title: The Pilgrims Board the Mayflower
historicEvents.description: "The Pilgrims boarded the Mayflower in search of religious freedom in the New World in September 1620. The Mayflower set sail from Plymouth, England, with 102 passengers, 40 of whom called themselves ""Saints."" After two stormy months at sea, the ship reached the New World. Nearly half of the group died during their first winter due to malnutrition and the harsh New England winter."

en.lifeSummary: When Anthony Fisher was born on 1 February 1557, in Syleham, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom, his father, William Fisher, was 33 and his mother, Margery Bert, was 28. He married Mary Fiske on 16 October 1586, in Fressingfield, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 7 sons and 2 daughters. He died in April 1640, in his hometown, at the age of 83, and was buried in Syleham, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Anthony Fisher est né le 1 février 1557, à Syleham, Suffolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, William Fisher, avait 33 ans et sa mère, Margery Bert, avait 28 ans. Il a épousé Mary Fiske le 16 octobre 1586, à Fressingfield, Suffolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 7 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé en avril 1640, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 83 ans, et a été enterré à Syleham, Suffolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Anthony Fisher am 1. Februar 1557 in Syleham, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater William Fisher 33 und seine Mutter Margery Bert 28. Er hat am 16. Oktober 1586 in Fressingfield, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom Mary Fiske geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 7 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb im April 1640 im Alter von 83 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort und wurde in Syleham, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Anthony Fisher è nato il il 1 febbraio 1557 nel Syleham, Suffolk, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, William Fisher, aveva 33 anni e il suo madre, Margery Bert, aveva 28 anni. Lui sposato Mary Fiske il 16 ottobre 1586, nel Fressingfield, Suffolk, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 7 figli e 2 figlie. Morì nel aprile 1640, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 83 anni, e fu sepolto a Syleham, Suffolk, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Anthony Fisherが1557年2月1日にイギリスイギリススフォルクシレハムで生まれた時，父William Fisherは33歳，母Margery Bertは28歳であった。1586年10月16日にイギリスイギリススフォルクフレシングフィールドでMary Fiskeと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも7人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1640年4月に故郷で83歳で死去し，イギリスイギリススフォルクシレハムにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Anthony Fisher(이)가 1557년 2월 1일 영국 잉글랜드 수폴크 실함에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 William Fisher(은)는 33세였고, 그의 어머니 Margery Bert(은)는 28세였다. 그는 1586년 10월 16일 영국 잉글랜드 수폴크 프레징필드에서 Mary Fiske(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 일곱 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1640년 4월 그의 고향에서 83세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 수폴크 실함에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Anthony Fisher nasceu em 1 de fevereiro de 1557, em Syleham, Suffolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, William Fisher, tinha 33 anos e sua mãe, Margery Bert, tinha 28 anos. Ele casou-se com Mary Fiske em 16 de outubro de 1586, em Fressingfield, Suffolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 7 filhos e 2 filhas. Ele faleceu em abril de 1640, em sua cidade natal, com 83 anos, e foi sepultado em Syleham, Suffolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Anthony Fisher родился 1 февраля 1557 г. в местности силэам, суффолк, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени William Fisher было 33 года, а матери, которую звали Margery Bert, 28. Он женился на женщине по имени Mary Fiske 16 октября 1586 г. в местности фрессингфиелд, суффолк, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 7 сыновей и 2 дочери. Он умер апрель 1640 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 83 лет и был похоронен в местности силэам, суффолк, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Anthony Fisher nació el 1 de febrero de 1557, en Syleham, Suffolk, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, William Fisher, tenía 33 años y su mamá, Margery Bert, tenía 28 años. Se casó con Mary Fiske el 16 de octubre de 1586, en Fressingfield, Suffolk, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 7 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió en abril de 1640, en su pueblo, a la edad de 83 años, y fue sepultado en Syleham, Suffolk, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
